rationale.R1.2: The edits do not address any logical inconsistencies in the original text.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is polished and reads smoothly with consistent register.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not explicitly state confidence levels for each claim.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the topics requested in the prompt.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced, but the edits may have inadvertently caused a minor regression in clarity.
